sentences.translation: Škola je pokrenula takmičenje u crtanju i fotografiji.
sentences.translationEn: The school launched a drawing and photography competition.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ طُلَّابٌ مِنْ كُلِّ الصُّفُوفِ فِي الْمُسَابَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Učenici iz svih razreda su učestvovali u takmičenju.
sentences.translationEn: Students from all grades participated in the competition.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَارَتِ اللَّجْنَةُ أَجْمَلَ الْأَعْمَالِ وَأَعْلَنَتِ الْفَائِزِينَ.
sentences.translation: Komisija je odabrala najljepše radove i objavila pobjednike.
sentences.translationEn: The committee chose the most beautiful works and announced the winners.

sentences.arabic: عُرِضَتِ الأَعْمَالُ الْفَائِزَةُ فِي مَدْخَلِ الْمَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Pobjednički radovi su izloženi u hodniku škole.
sentences.translationEn: The winning works were displayed in the school entrance.
